title: Calculation Date function using interval and year
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_1 ( id_tempo INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, data TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_1 WHERE data BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2013-01-01 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year' AND TIMESTAMP '2013-01-02 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year';
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_2 ( id_tempo INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data DATE NOT NULL CHECK (data >= DATE '2000-01-01') );
key_bug_features: Calculation Date function using interval with year
